As it looks like the Nvidia Drivers Version 510 disabled VRAM overflow into system memory or overflow handling of VRAM. This means older GPUs having less than 4GB VRAM (which is below DOOM Eternal's Minimum requirements) will not be able to handle the game although they did before. If you are able please report this problem to Nvidia so maybe a Dev can get this problem fixed sometimes soon as this issue is here already for a fairly long time and seems to not only affect this game
